block.createnuclearindustrys.uranium_fue: The _fuel core_ of a nuclear fission reactor.
Absorbs radiation from neighbouring rods, generating _heat_ that spreads through connected _Heat Pipes_.
Risk of _meltdown_! Install _Boron Control Rods_ nearby to absorb excess radiation.
block.createnuclearindustrys.boron_contr: Dampens _nuclear reactions_ by absorbing stray radiation particles.
When Adjacent to Uranium Fuel Rods
Absorbs incoming _radiation particles_, slowing the chain reaction and preventing _heat buildup_ in neighbouring rods.
Monitors the _temperature_ of a connected heat network.
Displays the current _heat level_ in degrees. Place between a reactor and generator to track output and prevent overheating.
block.createnuclearindustrys.heat_pipe.t: Conducts _thermal energy_ between heat network components.
Gradually _equalises heat_ across all connected nodes. Route energy from a _reactor_ to a _Thermal Generator_ using pipes.
block.createnuclearindustrys.thermal_gen: Outputs a spinning _shaft_ once the network temperature exceeds 10°. Speed and _stress capacity_ scale with heat level.
Generates up to _512 SU_ of stress capacity. Keep the reactor fuelled and _coolant flowing_ to sustain output.
